arts.ttl: Fernandinho: I’m really proud of Rodri!
arts.sum: Fernandinho, speaking this week ahead of the Spurs encounter, said he’s really proud of Rodri and also revealed his delight that a holding midfielder has won the prestigious football honour. “Obviously individually it’s a really nice award but I’m pretty sure he knows he’s got the contribution from the club and every player who helped him achieve that moment.

arts.ttl: City v Tottenham matchday programme: Rodri special!
arts.sum: And we also look back at a famous game against this evening’s opponents from 30 years ago, one the late, great John Motson ranked among his favourite matches to ever cover. We have the usual favourites like Pep Guardiola ’s manager notes, Mike Summerbee’s Buzzer column and a focus on the visitors, Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Tottenham XI vs Man City – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur head to the Etihad this weekend to take on Premier League champions Manchester City. Both sides are looking to respond to defeats before the international break, with Spurs having lost at home to Ipswich Town.
